content: HMS uses rolling 252-day window for factor IC calculation; shorter windows increase noise, longer windows miss regime shifts
Factor pipeline: raw → winsorize(1%,99%) → cross-section z-score → neutralize(industry,mktcap) → alpha combination
Trade execution uses TWAP over 30min window for positions >0.5% ADV to minimize market impact
HMS data sources: Wind (primary CN equities), Bloomberg (cross-asset, FX), internal tick DB (HDF5 via h5py)
Backtest risk controls: max single position 3%, sector cap 15%, turnover penalty 0.003 per unit
Momentum factor uses 12-1 month returns (skip last month) — standard Jegadeesh-Titman; raw returns not risk-adj
ART[2026-04-09] ~/hms/notebooks/factor_ic_analysis_2026Q1.ipynb
Signal combination: equal-weight IC-weighted blend; re-calibrate weights quarterly; use expanding window IC not rolling
Stock universe: CSI 500 + CSI 300 constituents, exclude ST stocks, min 60d trading history, min float 500M CNY
HMS autoresearch scheduler runs daily at 08:30 HKT via launchd; produces factor report + signal update
Risk model: Barra-style, 10 style factors + industry dummies + specific risk; estimation universe = all A-shares
Portfolio rebalance: weekly (Friday close); daily signal update but not all signals cross threshold for trade
IC > 0.05 sustained over 12m is considered live-tradeable; IC > 0.08 is strong; decay half-life < 5 days is too noisy
NLP sentiment: SnowNLP for CN text, BERT-base-chinese for classification; news from Tushare + Wind news API
OPEN: Investigate low-frequency options flow as alpha signal for HMS universe. No conclusion yet.
BUG FIXED: Lookahead bias in factor neutralization — was using full-sample mean; fixed to use expanding window mean only
ART[2026-04-09] ~/hms/reports/weekly_signal_report_2026W14.pdf
OpenClaude: Claude Code + MCP servers + Edge TTS + WhatsApp bridge. Core loop: message → classify → route → respond
Keyed message queue: one slot per sender-key; newer message overwrites pending; prevents buildup during busy periods
Dual timeout pattern: 30s tool-call timeout (hard), 90s total response timeout (soft); escalates to fallback text reply
Crash recovery: supervisor watches openclaude process; auto-restart with 5s backoff; max 3 restarts per hour
OPEN: Add calendar/email integration to OpenClaude. WhatsApp → 'what is on my calendar' → fetch Google Cal events
IGSL v2 uses EMA α=0.1 for health scoring to smooth outlier sessions; threshold default 0.60 for alerts
Memory node half-lives: DEC=None, PAT=30d, ARCH=60d, ART=14d, LOOP=None, GEN=90d, ERR=180d
Token budget: T0(80) + T1(50) + Index(50) + HardSkills(460) = 640 always; soft skills load on keyword match only
BM25 search boost: score × (0.6 + 0.4 × health_score); memory search: score × weight × recency_factor
EvoGraph records FIX/DERIVED/CAPTURED modes; parent→child with session_id + trigger + delta summary
OPEN: Add semantic embedding search to skill graph using all-MiniLM-L6-v2 for cross-skill discovery
Session hook chain: session_start_v2.sh → additionalContext JSON → health_recorder.py per tool → retrospective_v2.py on stop
5 integration connections: skill-applied, memory-to-skills, health-sync, session-context, post-session
Blackboard MCP: shared state server for multi-agent coordination; keys namespaced by project; TTL 24h default
Deep Research MCP: Firecrawl + Claude synthesis; max 20 pages per query; outputs structured JSON report
For large DataFrames (>1M rows): use vectorized ops, avoid apply(), use numba for custom aggregations
Feature branch workflow: branch from main, PR with description, squash merge; never force-push main
API retry pattern: exponential backoff 1s→2s→4s→8s, max 4 retries, jitter ±20%, 429 triggers immediate backoff
LaTeX: use \input{} not \include{} for sub-files to avoid page breaks; hyperref must be last package
LaTeX pdflatex error 'undefined control sequence': usually missing package or typo in command name; check log line
Claude Code best results: give file paths + line numbers, state what NOT to change, prefer Edit over Write
Debug protocol: reproduce → isolate → hypothesize → test one change → verify. Never change two things at once
macOS launchd: use StartInterval for polling, StartCalendarInterval for cron-style; plist in ~/Library/LaunchAgents
JSON schema validation with jsonschema: draft7, use $defs for reusable types, additionalProperties: false for strict mode
Bash: always set -euo pipefail; quote all variables; use [[ ]] not [ ]; trap EXIT for cleanup

CUHK submission format: PDF via Blackboard; filename convention: STUDENTID_COURSECODE_ASS#.pdf
